# Production Timeline: Phase 0 -- Prototype
*Generated by Producer Agent - Game Studio Sub-Agents v1.0*

**Project**: Nookstead
**Phase**: 0 (Prototype)
**Duration**: 8 weeks (2026-02-14 to 2026-04-10)
**Objective**: Prove the core USP -- a player walks through a shared town and talks to an AI NPC that remembers previous conversations.
**Decision Point**: Go/No-Go for Phase 1 (Vertical Slice) at week 8.

---

## Overview

```
Week 1-2:  M0.1 - Walking on Tiles
Week 3-4:  M0.2 - Multiplayer Sync
Week 5-6:  M0.3 - NPC Talks
Week 7-8:  M0.4 - NPC Remembers
Week 8:    Go/No-Go Evaluation
```

## Detailed Weekly Breakdown

### Week 1 (Feb 14 - Feb 20): M0.1 Setup & Map Rendering
**Focus**: Phaser.js integration with Next.js, tilemap loading

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|
| Mon | Install Phaser.js 3 in apps/game; create PhaserGame.tsx with dynamic import | Mechanics Dev | Phaser renders in Next.js page |
| Tue | Create BootScene with asset loading pipeline | Mechanics Dev | Asset loader working |
| Wed | Create test tilemap in Tiled (64x64 tiles, all layers defined in engine-setup) | Sr Game Designer | town-test.json tilemap |
| Thu | Implement TownScene: load tilemap, render all layers in correct order | Mechanics Dev | Map visible in browser |
| Fri | Integrate LimeZu tileset assets; verify visual quality | Sr Game Designer | Art looks correct, no seams |

### Week 2 (Feb 21 - Feb 27): M0.1 Player Movement & Polish
**Focus**: Player character, movement, collision, camera

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|
| Mon | Implement Player entity with 4-directional movement + animation | Mechanics Dev | Player walks on map |
| Tue | Implement collision layer detection (arcade physics) | Mechanics Dev | Player blocked by walls |
| Wed | Implement camera follow with deadzone and edge clamping | Mechanics Dev | Smooth camera |
| Thu | Add mobile virtual joystick; test on mobile browsers | Mechanics Dev | Touch controls working |
| Fri | Performance testing (FPS, load times); telemetry integration (session, performance events) | QA Agent + Data Scientist | M0.1 baseline metrics |

**M0.1 Milestone Review**: Feb 27
- Criteria: Player walks on tile map, collision works, 60 FPS desktop / 30 FPS mobile
- Artifacts: Performance baseline report, known issues list

### Week 3 (Feb 28 - Mar 6): M0.2 Server Setup
**Focus**: Colyseus server, basic room, client connection

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|
| Mon | Generate apps/server Nx project; install Colyseus | Mechanics Dev | Server project scaffolded |
| Tue | Implement WorldState schema (PlayerState, NPCState, GameClockState) | Mechanics Dev | Schema compiles |
| Wed | Implement TownRoom: onCreate, onJoin, onLeave | Mechanics Dev | Room handles connections |
| Thu | Implement server-side movement validation | Mechanics Dev | Server validates inputs |
| Fri | Implement Colyseus.js client in game app; connect to server | Mechanics Dev | Client connects to room |

### Week 4 (Mar 7 - Mar 13): M0.2 Multiplayer & NPCs
**Focus**: Multi-client sync, NPC entities, pathfinding

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|
| Mon | Render remote player sprites from server state | Mechanics Dev | See other players |
| Tue | Client-side interpolation for smooth movement | Mechanics Dev | Smooth remote movement |
| Wed | Add NPC entities to WorldState; basic path movement | Mechanics Dev | NPCs walk on map |
| Thu | NPC A* pathfinding on collision grid | Mechanics Dev | NPCs navigate around objects |
| Fri | Multi-client testing (2-10 players); latency measurement | QA Agent | M0.2 network metrics |

**M0.2 Milestone Review**: Mar 13
- Criteria: 2+ players see each other, NPCs move server-side, latency < 150ms
- Artifacts: Network performance report, multiplayer test results

---

### Week 5 (Mar 14 - Mar 20): M0.3 AI Service & Dialogue Backend
**Focus**: AI service setup, Claude API integration, seed persona

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|
| Mon | Generate apps/ai-service Nx project; install Anthropic SDK | Mechanics Dev | AI service scaffolded |
| Tue | Implement POST /agent/dialogue endpoint; Claude API call | Mechanics Dev | API returns NPC response |
| Wed | Create Marko seed persona JSON; design system prompt template | Sr Game Designer | Seed persona and prompt |
| Thu | Implement prompt builder (persona + context + history) | Mechanics Dev | Full prompt pipeline |
| Fri | Wire client -> server -> ai-service flow; basic response display | Mechanics Dev | End-to-end dialogue works |

### Week 6 (Mar 21 - Mar 27): M0.3 Dialogue UI & Polish
**Focus**: Dialogue window, quick replies, free text, quality tuning

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|
| Mon | Implement DialogueWindow React component (portrait, text, input) | Mechanics Dev | UI renders correctly |
| Tue | Implement quick reply generation and display | Mechanics Dev | Quick replies work |
| Wed | Implement free text input with basic moderation filter | Mechanics Dev | Free text input works |
| Thu | Dialogue quality tuning: test prompts, refine persona, adjust parameters | Sr Game Designer | Dialogue feels natural |
| Fri | LLM cost tracking integration; dialogue telemetry events | Data Scientist | Cost per dialogue measured |

**M0.3 Milestone Review**: Mar 27
- Criteria: Player talks to Marko, response in < 3 seconds, stays in character
- Artifacts: Dialogue quality samples, LLM cost report, latency metrics

---

### Week 7 (Mar 28 - Apr 3): M0.4 Memory System
**Focus**: Memory storage, retrieval, importance scoring

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|
| Mon | Set up PostgreSQL with pgvector; create memories table | Mechanics Dev | Database ready |
| Tue | Implement memory creation on dialogue events | Mechanics Dev | Memories stored per turn |
| Wed | Implement importance scoring via Haiku | Mechanics Dev | Importance 1-10 assigned |
| Thu | Implement embedding generation for memories | Mechanics Dev | Vector search ready |
| Fri | Implement memory retrieval algorithm (recency + importance + relevance) | Mechanics Dev | Top-10 retrieval works |

### Week 8 (Apr 4 - Apr 10): M0.4 Reflections & Evaluation
**Focus**: Reflection system, integration testing, Go/No-Go

| Day | Task | Owner | Deliverable |
|-----|------|-------|-------------|
| Mon | Integrate retrieved memories into dialogue prompt context | Mechanics Dev | NPC references past |
| Tue | Implement reflection system (daily trigger, Sonnet call, store) | Mechanics Dev | Reflections generate |
| Wed | End-to-end testing: multi-day conversation progression | QA Agent | Verification report |
| Thu | Cost analysis: actual vs target ($0.03/player-hour) | Data Scientist | Cost analysis report |
| Fri | **Go/No-Go Evaluation Meeting** | All Agents | Decision document |

**M0.4 Milestone Review + Go/No-Go**: Apr 10
- Criteria: NPC references past conversations, reflections generate insights, cost < $0.03/hr
- Artifacts: Complete prototype demo, cost analysis, quality assessment, Go/No-Go decision

| Agent | Primary Responsibilities | Milestones |

| Mechanics Developer | All implementation (Phaser, Colyseus, AI service, DB) | M0.1-M0.4 |
| Sr Game Designer | Tilemap design, seed personas, prompt engineering, quality review | M0.1, M0.3, M0.4 |
| QA Agent | Test plans, milestone validation, performance testing | M0.1-M0.4 |
| Data Scientist | Telemetry integration, LLM cost tracking, A/B test framework | M0.1-M0.4 |
| Market Analyst | Market intelligence updates, competitive monitoring | Ongoing |
| Producer Agent | Timeline management, milestone reviews, blocker resolution | Ongoing |

## Risk Mitigation Schedule

| Week | Risk to Monitor | Mitigation Action |
|------|----------------|-------------------|
| 1-2 | Phaser + Next.js SSR conflict | Dynamic import pattern; test early |
| 3-4 | WebSocket performance with multiple clients | Load test with 10 clients by end of week 4 |
| 5-6 | LLM latency > 3 seconds | Test Claude API latency; have Haiku fallback ready |
| 5-6 | NPC breaks character | Iterate system prompt; add post-processing filter |
| 7-8 | LLM costs exceed budget | Track cost per turn from Day 1; optimize context size |
| 7-8 | Memory retrieval returns irrelevant results | Manual review; tune alpha/beta/gamma weights |

## Go/No-Go Criteria (Week 8)

### GO if ALL of the following are true:
1. **Experience Quality**: Talking to an NPC that remembers you feels meaningfully different from scripted dialogue (qualitative assessment by team + 3-5 external testers)
2. **Cost Viability**: LLM cost per player-hour is under $0.05 (stretch goal: $0.03) with clear path to optimization
3. **Technical Stability**: Prototype runs for 30+ minutes without crashes; supports 5+ concurrent players
4. **Performance**: NPC response latency p95 < 5 seconds; client FPS meets targets

### NO-GO if ANY of the following are true:
1. NPC dialogue does not feel qualitatively different from a generic chatbot
2. LLM costs exceed $0.10 per player-hour with no clear optimization path
3. Memory retrieval produces irrelevant or confusing results more than 20% of the time
4. Technical blockers prevent basic prototype functionality

### PIVOT options if NO-GO:
- Reduce NPC count (5 instead of 25-50) and increase per-NPC quality budget
- Switch to hybrid model (scripted structure + AI fill-in) to reduce costs
- Target single-player or small co-op instead of MMO to reduce server costs
- Defer memory system and focus on high-quality single-session dialogue
